instruction: You are enrolled in 4 courses with different grading policies. Your goal is to maximize your semester GPA. For each course: (1) Check your current weighted score and identify remaining assignments. (2) Determine the letter grade you're on track for. (3) Identify which course has the most room for improvement relative to effort (i.e., highest credit weight with the most remaining high-weight assignments). Submit any easy-win unsubmitted assignments with file "optimization.pdf". Then send a brief strategy message to your advisor (Dr. Nguyen).
